definitions.usage_example: He bought the book and the pen as well.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIﾃ哲 DE as well AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He bought the book and the pen as well.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Ademﾃ｡s; tambiﾃｩn. (Usado al final de una clﾃ｡usula).]
definitions.usage_context_es: In addition; too. (Used at the end of a clause).

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Ya que / Puesto que (causa)]
definitions.usage_example: Since you are here, you can help.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Since you are here, you can help.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para introducir una razﾃｳn (similar a 'because').]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a reason (similar to 'because').

definitions.usage_example: I have been here since 9 AM.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I have been here since 9 AM.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para indicar un punto de inicio en el tiempo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to indicate a starting point in time.

definitions.usage_example: I don't want to go. Besides, I am tired.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I don't want to go. Besides, I am tired.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Ademﾃ｡s; es mﾃ｡s (usado para aﾃｱadir otra razﾃｳn).]
definitions.usage_context_es: In addition; moreover (used to add another reason).

definitions.usage_example: As I was tired, I went to bed.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: As I was tired, I went to bed.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para indicar una razﾃｳn (similar a 'because').]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to state a reason (similar to 'because').

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He sang as he walked.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para indicar que dos acciones ocurren al mismo tiempo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to indicate that two actions are happening at the same time.

definitions.usage_example: She is as tall as me.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: She is as tall as me.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para hacer una comparaciﾃｳn de igualdad.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to make a comparison of equality.

definitions.usage_example: In addition to his salary, he gets a bonus.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIﾃ哲 DE in addition AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: In addition to his salary, he gets a bonus.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Como persona, cosa o circunstancia adicional.]
definitions.usage_context_es: As an extra person, thing, or circumstance.

definitions.usage_example: I was studying; meanwhile, my brother was playing.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I was studying; meanwhile, my brother was playing.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: En el perﾃｭodo de tiempo intermedio.]
definitions.usage_context_es: In the intervening period of time.

definitions.usage_example: He is my father's brother. In other words, he is my uncle.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIﾃ哲 DE in other words AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He is my father's brother. In other words, he is my uncle.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para explicar algo de una forma mﾃ｡s simple o diferente.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to explain something in a simpler or different way.

definitions.usage_example: I don't know what to do.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I don't know what to do.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como pronombre relativo para referirse a 'la(s) cosa(s) que'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a relative pronoun to refer to 'the thing(s) that'.
